description: Six manually reviewed end-to-end class scenarios, evaluated separately from the 30 item-level benchmark cases.

scenarios.reviewer_notes: Prospectively reviewed and approved before running PharmaSignal or the Validation Benchmark. The official RxClass is Serotonin Reuptake Inhibitor (N0000175696), class type EPC, source FDASPL, relation has_EPC. This class is broader than selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors and includes drugs such as trazodone, so the SSRI label was not used. The three representative drugs were fixed by CMS 2024 total-claims order: trazodone (18,417,710; EP-01), sertraline (16,155,695; EP-02), and fluoxetine (7,496,788; EP-03). HCl salt names were matched to the corresponding ingredient names. Fixed SPL identities were reused unchanged from EP-01 through EP-03. The manual reference assessment is derived prospectively from 3/3 explicit-positive drug-level reviews. This scenario tests class-level aggregation only. The current runner does not automatically revalidate RxClass membership, CMS ordering, the class identifier, or class-level determinism. Completing one class scenario does not satisfy the full 6/6 validation gate.
